## User Profile

# Behavioral Profile

## Security and Installation Practices

- User strongly prioritizes security-first and cautious handling of AI agent installation.
- User strictly rejects running unverified 'curl | bash' installation scripts for AI agents without thorough prior auditing and verification.
- User explicitly avoids executing any unverified installation scripts to mitigate security risks.

## AI Agent Execution Preferences

- User avoids running multiple parallel or independent AI agents on the same machine to prevent resource conflicts, redundancy, and security risks.
- User prefers studying, internalizing, and integrating architectural and design insights from open-source AI agent projects rather than concurrent execution.

## Architectural and Research Interests

- User is particularly interested in evolutionary AI agent architectural ideas.
- User values integrating features such as self-evolving and tool auto-creation, notably from project-hermes-agent, into their own project-openclaw.
- User focuses on absorbing and internalizing architectural innovations from open-source community projects rather than running multiple AI agents concurrently.

## Knowledge and Memory Management

- User maintains a disciplined, methodical, and automated daily memory compression workflow leveraging AI-based summarization tools.
- User uses this workflow to efficiently summarize, manage, and compress important knowledge methodically.

## Working Style and Identity

- User exhibits a methodical and disciplined approach to knowledge management and R&D.
- User prioritizes a security-first mindset in all scripts and agent execution workflows.
- User prefers deep architectural understanding and integration over running multiple AI agents concurrently to achieve evolutionary AI system development.

---

This consolidation merges repetitious points about security-first installation practices, single-agent execution preferences, and interest in project-hermes-agent’s architectural features into clear categories. Trivial operational details and repeated phrasings were pruned for clarity and focus on durable user preferences and working style.
- User strongly rejects unverified 'curl | bash' installation scripts and prioritizes security audits.
- User avoids running multiple AI agents concurrently on a single machine to prevent resource conflicts and security risks.
- User prefers to study and internalize architectural designs from open-source AI agent projects over concurrent execution on one machine.
- User integrates evolutionary AI agent features, specifically from project-hermes-agent, into project-openclaw.
- User strongly rejects executing unverified 'curl | bash' installation scripts to ensure security.
- User avoids running multiple AI agents in parallel on a single machine to mitigate conflicts and security risks.
- User prioritizes integration and internalization of architectural insights from project-hermes-agent into project-openclaw instead of running multiple agents concurrently.
- User maintains a disciplined, automated daily memory compression workflow leveraging AI summarization for efficient knowledge management.
